title: Uruguayan Horseradish Gratin
description: A spicy and rich side dish, perfect for accompanying grilled meats. The Uruguayan influence adds a unique twist to this classic gratin.
instructions: In a saucepan, combine grated Uruguayan cheese, grated horseradish, chopped pungent onion, and heavy cream. Heat over low heat, stirring until the cheese melts.
In a separate baking dish, arrange a layer of thinly sliced silky potatoes.
Pour the cheese mixture over the potatoes and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Repeat the layering process, ending with a layer of potatoes on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown.
